one_time_description: Write-off of investment in Nauticol Energy Ltd. due to uncertainty in ability to recover carrying value
economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business enterprises including Driftpile First Nation Enterprises Inc., Driftpile Timber Management LP, Driftpile Construction Services LP, Driftpile Land Holdings LP, and Driftpile Business Corporation. Also holds Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust with legacy fund investment of ~$50.5M. Driftpile Truckstop Limited also mentioned.
notes: Audit is qualified due to asset retirement obligations not being estimated or recorded as required under PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022. Nation consolidates Driftpile Agricultural Settlement Trust (Dec 31 year-end) and uses modified equity method for 5 business enterprises. Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust legacy fund holds ~$50.5M in investments. Large RBC loans totaling ~$13.75M were taken during the year secured by Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust. Deferred revenue is significant at $16.7M. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($29,224,122) + LSLIRC ($782,641) + FNDF ($684,122) + CMHC subsidy ($211,401) = $30,902,286; OSR = $42,680,913 - $30,902,286 = $11,778,627. Figures adjusted: total_government_transfers set to 30218286 (ISC + LSLIRC + FNDF only, excluding CMHC as subsidy; including CMHC would be 30902286). Restated: total_government_transfers includes ISC+LSLIRC+FNDF+CMHC = 30902286 and osr = 11778627. Prior year figures from 2022 comparative column used.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
